l1.title: Verify your identity
l1.aadhaarHint: 12 digits. We send an OTP to your Aadhaar-linked mobile (may differ from your EaseCab number).
l1.successBody: Now complete your profile to start posting.

fallback.title: No Aadhaar-linked mobile?
fallback.body: You can get verified manually — our team will review your details. (Available soon.)

driver.title: Driver credentials
driver.subtitle: Add your licence and vehicle to earn the verified-driver badge.
driver.dlSubtitle: Verify your DL number and date of birth.
driver.uploadOptional: Add a photo of the document (optional)
driver.docBadType: Use a JPG, PNG, WebP or PDF
driver.badgePending: Submitted — the verified-driver badge is granted after admin review.

errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.invalidOtp: Couldn't verify that code. Check it and try again.
errors.verifyFailed: Couldn't verify these details. Please check and retry.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
